reasoning.fx_and_style: The video exhibits a surrealist, photorealistic 3D style with a seamless morphing transition. A fiery explosion effect bursts in a ring shape towards the end. reasoning.camera: The camera maintains an eye-level angle and continuously pushes in toward the center-framed subject. The shot size starts as a full shot and gradually becomes tighter. The depth of field remains deep, keeping both the foreground and the background in focus in real-time.
reasoning.lighting: Lighting starts with a cool top light from above, then shifts to a multi-color setup as warm illumination contrasts with the cool ambient light. The overall lighting intensity remains normal, with a distinct spotlight effect appearing beneath the subject.
